subcodes.first_line: O dear maidservant of Baha'ullah I don't know any preface more illustrious than this preface, therefore I call thee by that address.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز بهاء الله عنوانی اشرف از این عنوان نمیدانم تا ترا بان عنوان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @high station of the true believer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
